name: Inbound Transactions
description: Inbound transaction processing with queues, routing rules, exceptions, and audit trail.

forms.name: Events
forms.description: Inbound event receipts — the central event log

forms.name: Error Queue
forms.description: Failed events awaiting retry or resolution

workflows.name: Error Queue Escalation Check
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Critical" value="@values['Priority'] == 'Critical' || @values['Severity'] == 'Critical'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Normal" value="@values['Priority'] != 'Critical' && @values['Severity'] != 'Critical'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Escalation Alert" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">ESCALATION: error queue priority=<%= @values['Priority'] %> severity=<%= @values['Severity'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Normal" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">error queue updated, priority normal</parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

forms.name: Processing Rules
forms.description: Event routing rules — match events to handler trees

workflows.name: Auto Timestamp
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Created" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">Record created at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @created_by %> on form <%= @form_slug %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Submission Notification
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Format Notification" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">New submission by <%= @submitted_by %> on form <%= @form_slug %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>
